# Summary

Current Codex hook discovery and file-format guidance.

# Key facts

- Codex discovers `hooks.json` next to active config layers.
- The docs call out `~/.codex/hooks.json` and `<repo>/.codex/hooks.json` as the most useful locations.
- Matching hook files are additive; higher-precedence layers do not replace lower-precedence hooks.

# Refresh notes

- No public markdown source was found during this pilot; this cache is a normalized summary of the rendered docs page.
